LanguageData.AnimalPodCrash: A transport pod carrying a {PAWN_kind} called {PAWN_nameDef} is crashing nearby. If it survives the crash, it will be badly wounded.\n\nIf you tend to its wounds, it may decide to stick around.
LanguageData.AJLetter: The animal you rescued is joining the colony
LanguageData.ADJLetter: The animal you rescued isn't joining the colony
LanguageData.Traitor:
A colonist named {PAWN_nameDef}, which you have accepted into your ranks, turns out to be an enemy agent from {PAWN_factionName}.
You can capture {PAWN_objective} for recruitment or slavery purposes.
LanguageData.SpaceBattle: Several massive spaceships have engaged in combat in the planet's orbit. Missed shots and debris can impact the ground in the area. This can lead to massive fires.
LanguageData.ShuttleCrash:
A heavily damaged shuttle is plummeting from the sky and will violently crash nearby.

The impact will scatter chemfuel and ignite a dangerous fire.

Cargo and passengers will be found among the wreckage.

You must act quickly if you want to rescue the survivors, salvage the cargo, and stop the fire from spreading out of control.
LanguageData.EarthquakeDesc: A magnitude {0} earthquake has struck the region!\n\nThe violent shaking has ruptured the ground and caused severe structural damage near the epicenter. Repairs may be required.
LanguageData.CPW:
You have detected a cluster of cargo pods crashing nearby.
Perhaps you'll find something useful in the wreckage.
LanguageData.CPA:
You have detected a cluster of cargo pods crashing nearby.
Perhaps you'll find something useful in the wreckage.
LanguageData.CAWI:
A group of {PAWN_kind}, abandoned or lost, wanders in.
They seem to have belonged to some caravan, as they still carry packs with valuable items. You can collect these items if you tame them or kill them. Otherwise, they will leave the area in a couple of days.
LanguageData.CSLetterContent: A grove of wild {0} has sprouted nearby!\n\nIf you wait for the plants to grow, you'll be able to harvest them.
LanguageData.BAWI:
A group of {0}, abandoned or lost, wanders in.
They seem accustomed to human contact and are joining the colony.
LanguageData.WMWI: A small, pre-neolithic tribe of wild men wanders in. You can attempt to tame them.
LanguageData.HP: A group of hunters from {0} are passing through the area. They will hunt here for a few hours and then move on.
